title: Autonomous ops-status flake stabilization
changes: stabilized autonomous ops-status stale-run tests to avoid suite-order dependency
converted stale-run setup to deterministic in_progress state without runtime auto-start side effects
used project_id-filtered ops-status endpoint in stale/no-progress assertions to avoid top-N truncation interference from unrelated projects

tests.command: uv run --package framework pytest core/framework/server/tests/test_api.py -k "autonomous_ops_status_includes_release_matrix_snapshot or autonomous_ops_status_reports_stuck_runs or autonomous_ops_status_reports_no_progress_projects" -q

tests.summary: Upstream Sync Regression Gate summary: ok=7 failed=0

notes: removed nondeterminism caused by active-session auto-start and no_progress top-50 slicing during full-suite runs
